hooks.description: Declare the repositories that TeaTree should provision for this overlay.
hooks.name: get_repos

hooks.description: Return the ordered setup steps for a newly created worktree.
hooks.name: get_provision_steps

hooks.description: Add overlay-specific environment variables to the generated worktree env file.
hooks.name: get_env_extra

hooks.description: Expose named service commands for `worktree start` and operator discovery.
hooks.name: get_run_commands

hooks.description: Describe how a worktree database should be provisioned or restored.
hooks.name: get_db_import_strategy

hooks.description: Return callbacks to run after database setup completes.
hooks.name: get_post_db_steps

hooks.description: Declare extra symlinks that should exist inside the worktree.
hooks.name: get_symlinks

hooks.description: Return additional service metadata for worktree-lifecycle orchestration.
hooks.name: get_services_config

hooks.description: Declare Docker base images teatree builds once and shares across worktrees.
hooks.name: get_base_images

hooks.description: Declare service names that MUST run in Docker — enforced at `worktree provision`.
hooks.name: get_docker_services

hooks.description: Return merge-request validation problems for this overlay.
hooks.name: metadata.validate_mr

hooks.description: Return the active overlay skill path and remote match patterns.
hooks.name: metadata.get_skill_metadata

hooks.description: Return the GitLab project path for CI operations.
hooks.name: metadata.get_ci_project_path

hooks.description: Return E2E runner configuration (runner, test_dir, settings_module, project_path, ref).
hooks.name: metadata.get_e2e_config

hooks.description: Detect the current tenant variant from environment.
hooks.name: metadata.detect_variant

hooks.description: Return overlay-specific tool commands for t3 <overlay> tool.
hooks.name: metadata.get_tool_commands

hooks.description: Return GitLab project paths to sync MRs from.
hooks.name: metadata.get_followup_repos

skill_metadata_fields.description: Git remote patterns that activate the overlay skill outside the host project.
skill_metadata_fields.name: remote_patterns
